subject: Implement full React client with styling
description: Full implementation of all React components with Tailwind dark theme (Linear/Raycast aesthetic). Left/right message alignment, DM thread collapse, emoji reactions, plan/permission cards, task sidebar, presence roster, session stats. Auto-scroll with new message indicator. 150ms slide-in animations, reaction pop-in, smooth thread transitions. Agent avatars (first letter + color circle, lead gets crown).
